title: Immune cell identifier and classifier (ImmunIC) for single cell transcriptomic readouts.
author: Park SY Ter-Saakyan S Faraci G Lee HY
content: S-EPMC10372073 PMC10372073 Immune cell identifier and classifier (ImmunIC) for single cell transcriptomic readouts. Single cell RNA sequencing has a central role in immune profiling, identifying specific immune cells as disease markers and suggesting therapeutic target genes of immune cells. Immune
